name: Tiramisu Toffee Torte
recipeIngredient: 6 3/8 oz Toffee candy bars (4 bars), very finely chopped
1 3/8 oz Toffee candy bar (1 bar); chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Pillsbury Bake-Off 35th Contest Cookbook
Heat oven to 350 degrees F. Grease and flour two 9-inch or 8-inch round cake pans.
In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, 1 cup of coffee, and egg whites at low speed until moistened. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed. Fold in the chopped toffee candy bars. Spread batter in greased and floured pans. Bake 9-inch pans for 20 to 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the centre comes out clean. (Bake 8-inch pans for 30 to 40 minutes.) Cool pans for 10 minutes, then remove from pans. Cool completely.
In a medium bowl, combine sugar, chocolate syrup, and cream cheese; beat until smooth. Add whipped cream and vanilla; beat until light and fluffy. Refrigerate until ready to use.
To assemble the cake, slice each layer in half horizontally to make 4 layers. Drizzle each cut side with 1/4 cup of coffee. Place 1 layer, coffee side up, on a serving plate; spread with 3/4 cup frosting. Repeat with the second and third cake layers. Top with the remaining cake layer.
Frost the sides and top of the cake with the remaining frosting. Garnish the top with chopped toffee bars. Store in the refrigerator.
Notes: High Altitude - Above 3500 Feet: Add 1/4 cup flour to dry cake mix. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 to 35 minutes.
